title: Manageable Storage
description: Bigger chests, but still manageable. No chests with 8000 slots, but still bigger chests.
body:
Manageable Storage is a Minecraft Neoforge mod provides 3 new chests and 1 new material:
- Upgraded Chest: Has 36 slots, crafted with 8 Refined Wood
- Expansive Chest: Has 45 slots, crafted with 6 Refined Wood and 1 Upgraded Chest
- Massive Chest: Has 70 slots, crafted with 6 Refined Wood, 2 Logs, and 1 Expansive Chest
- Refined Wood: Used for Chests, 3 Logs = 3 Refined Wood (shapeless)
